title: Coffin Text Spell 1002
source: Pyramid of Unas; Coffin of Sesenebnef
description: Coffin Text Spell 1002 from the ancient Egyptian funerary corpus.
introduction: Coffin Text Spell 1002 from the ancient Egyptian funerary corpus.

translation.text: From Coffin Text Spell 1002: An ancient Egyptian spell to empower the deceased's journey through the underworld and into the company of the gods.
